subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I testify that the ocean of Thy mercy hath billowed before the faces of Thy servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد ان بحر رحمتک ماج امام وجوه عبادک و شمس فضلک اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
